headline: These S&P500 stocks are gapping in today's session
summary: Curious about the market action on Monday? Dive into the US markets to explore the gap up and gap down stocks in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump Amid U.S.-Iran Attacks
summary: Dow Jones futures and oil prices will react as the U.S. and Israel continue attacks on Iran, which is vowing revenge for Ayatollah Khamenei.
